responsibilities: Worked on building an AI-based resume builder using Streamlit, HTML/CSS, and Python.
Used pdfkit and wkhtmltopdf for automated PDF resume generation.
Applied prompt engineering techniques to improve resume quality and relevance.

projects.title: Web-Based Virtual Assistant
description: Developed a web-based virtual assistant using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Implemented voice input using the Web Speech API for speech recognition.
Enabled interactive responses and basic task handling through browser-based automation.

projects.title: Stone–Paper–Scissors Game
description: Developed an interactive Stone–Paper–Scissors game using JavaScript with dynamic DOM manipulation.
Implemented game logic to generate random computer choices and determine win, loss, or draw outcomes.
Updated user and computer scores in real time and displayed results with visual feedback.
